history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Indonesian woman with a warm smile and glasses, wearing a light brown hijab, a peach-colored top, a brown cardigan, and a long, patterned skirt with a maroon and white ethnic motif, stands in front of a large, deep red shipping container. The container is part of a building's facade, with glass block windows visible above.

The shipping container has several signs and markings. On the left side, "JEND. A. YANI NO. 22" is prominently displayed in white block letters. To the right of this, a smaller sign in Indonesian reads "TERIMA KASIH UNTUK TIDAK MEMBAWA MAKANAN / MINUMAN DARI LUAR," which translates to "Thank you for not bringing food/drinks from outside." Further to the right, another sign in white text on a black background states "BAR DINING-GAME-KITCHEN AREA. / NO SMOKING / KEEP CLEAN." On the far right, a vertical sign lists "OPENING HOURS" and indicates "EVERY DAY 07:30 PM - 01:30 AM." Below this, a graphic features a person with a caption that appears to be a quote about coffee.

The lighting is bright and even, suggesting an overcast day or well-lit indoor space, casting soft shadows. The overall color palette is dominated by the deep red of the container, contrasted with the woman's earth-toned clothing and the neutral concrete floor and glass blocks. The mood is cheerful and welcoming, with the woman's smile and the inviting signage contributing to a relaxed atmosphere. The style is a blend of industrial (shipping container) and casual chic. The woman is posed confidently, with her left hand resting on the container door and her right arm slightly bent. The skirt has a voluminous drape, adding a dynamic element to her pose. The background also includes hints of an interior space visible through a glass door on the left, with some tables and chairs.
